title: ionoxalis galeottii
intro: Ionoxalis galeottii, also known as the Mexican Job's Tears or Coix lacryma-jobi var. ma-yuen, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ionoxalis galeottii include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve sleep. Herbal preparations of Ionoxalis galeottii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves or seeds in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
